DESCRIPTION: Verifies that a completely out-of-range ID returns HTTP 404
NAME: GET /posts/99999 returns 404 — far out-of-range ID

DESCRIPTION: Verifies that ID 0 (no post has id=0) returns HTTP 404
NAME: GET /posts/0 returns 404 — invalid lower boundary

DESCRIPTION: Verifies 200 status, full echoed payload, Content-Type header, and response time on a full update
NAME: PUT /posts/1 updates a post, echoes payload, returns 200 with correct headers

DESCRIPTION: Verifies the last valid post ID (100) returns HTTP 200 with a well-formed response
NAME: GET /posts/100 returns 200 — upper boundary valid ID

DESCRIPTION: Verifies 200 status, empty JSON object body, Content-Type header, and response time on delete
NAME: DELETE /posts/1 returns 200 with empty JSON body and correct headers

DESCRIPTION: Verifies userId filter returns the correct count (10) and every item belongs to the requested user
NAME: GET /posts?userId=1 returns exactly 10 posts all owned by user 1

DESCRIPTION: Verifies the API handles an empty JSON object and still returns 201 with a simulated id
NAME: POST /posts with empty body returns 201 with an ID

DESCRIPTION: Verifies that ID 101, one above the last seeded post, returns HTTP 404
NAME: GET /posts/101 returns 404 — first ID over upper boundary

DESCRIPTION: Verifies fields, JSON schema validation, and response time for a single post
NAME: GET /posts/1 returns correct post, passes schema, responds within 3s

DESCRIPTION: Verifies that the POST endpoint meets a 3-second response time threshold
NAME: POST /posts responds within 3 seconds

DESCRIPTION: Verifies the API accepts a minimal payload and still assigns an id in the response
NAME: POST /posts with partial payload still returns 201 with an ID

DESCRIPTION: Verifies status code, Content-Type, charset, and that the full dataset of 100 posts is returned
NAME: GET /posts returns 200 with exactly 100 posts

DESCRIPTION: Verifies that the DELETE response carries the Access-Control-Allow-Credentials header
NAME: DELETE /posts/1 response includes CORS header

DESCRIPTION: Verifies that Access-Control-Allow-Credentials and X-Content-Type-Options headers are present
NAME: GET /posts response includes CORS and security headers

DESCRIPTION: Verifies that deleting the last seeded post (id=100) returns 200 with an empty body
NAME: DELETE /posts/100 returns 200 — upper boundary post

DESCRIPTION: Verifies that PATCH merges the supplied title while keeping the original id and body fields intact
NAME: PATCH /posts/1 updates only the supplied field, preserves others

DESCRIPTION: Verifies that the path parameter ID takes precedence and the response id matches the path, not the body
NAME: PUT /posts/1 with mismatched ID in body still uses path ID

DESCRIPTION: Verifies 201 status, echoed payload fields, assigned id=101, and Content-Type header
NAME: POST /posts creates a new post and returns 201
